name: Norm AI
oneliner: Norm AI encodes regulatory rules as machine-executable policies, enabling AI agents to interpret and enforce compliance obligations in real time across financial services workflows.
finserv: Targets financial institutions directly, encoding SEC, FINRA, and AML regulation as structured executable policies. Series A signals institutional confidence in compliance automation.
team: US-based team with regulatory and AI engineering backgrounds. Already piloting with financial services firms.
thesis: As agentic systems take on more financial tasks, compliance rules must be machine-readable and enforceable at runtime. Norm AI is a potential integration partner for the regulated infrastructure layer.
evidence: Norm AI raises $27M Series A for regulatory compliance automation
